title: Comments on prototypes
description: Let designers leave inline feedback on a prototype without switching to Slack.

title: Mobile viewport preview toggle
description: Preview a prototype at phone/tablet widths without resizing the browser window.

title: One-click prototype duplication/versioning
description: Fork an existing prototype into a new folder to iterate on a variant quickly. Possibly show the relationship between the original and the variant/duplicate.

title: Export a prototype as static HTML
description: Bundle a single prototype for sharing outside the playground, no dev server required.

title: Inspect mode to identify JH components
description: Hover any element in a prototype to see which JH component renders it.

title: Editable prototype title & description
description: Update a prototype's metadata from its own page instead of hand-editing meta.ts.

title: Persisted external prototype links
description: Links to prototypes built outside the repo (Figma, v0) now survive a browser reset.

title: Documented jha-advanced-table
description: The legacy advanced table finally has real intent docs, props, events, and slots.

title: Dual repos
description: Create another repo to push public facing prototypes

title: Cursor + Cluade + Vendor sync
description: Commands sync when running a npm install. Research how to automate syncing so that cursor users always have the latest claude commands. (does npm run build = npm install?)

title: Collapse Kanban Columns
description: Ability to collapse columns (requested, planned, etc). That way the page doesn't become a long scroll. Maybe a way to archive as well?

title: Integrate other design systems?
description: Add ability to prototypes using other jack henry design systems? ie. RUI
